title: H1B Job Hunter — Inputs
description: Search for H1B-sponsoring jobs using keywords scraped directly from company ATS platforms (Greenhouse, Lever, Workday, etc.) via Google.

keywords.title: * Search Keywords (one per line)
keywords.description:
These keywords are searched inside job descriptions on ATS platforms. Use terms that appear IN job descriptions — not just titles.

Examples for Audit/Accounting: CPA, GAAP, internal audit, SOX, assurance
Examples for Data: SQL, Python, Tableau, data analyst
Examples for Finance: FP&A, financial modeling, CFA

location.title: * Location
location.description: City + State (e.g. 'Chicago, IL') or 'United States' for nationwide. Leave blank to search globally.

timeFilter.title: * Time Filter — How Recent Should Jobs Be?
timeFilter.description: Filter job postings by how recently they were indexed by Google. 'Past 24 Hours' is recommended for daily runs.

skills.title: * Your Skills (one per line) — for Skill Match Score
skills.description: Your skills are matched against each job description to calculate your Skill Match Score (1–10). Be specific.
skills.default:
CPA
GAAP
Excel
SQL
Internal audit
SOX compliance
Financial reporting
Risk assessment
Data analysis
Communication

resumeText.title: Resume Text (optional — paste full resume for better skill matching)

optEndDate.title: OPT / STEM OPT End Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
optEndDate.description: Your EAD card expiration date. Used to calculate urgency of H1B timeline.

maxJobsPerKeyword.title: Max Jobs Per Keyword
maxJobsPerKeyword.description: Max job links to collect per keyword across all ATS platforms. Each keyword searches 8 ATS sites. Recommended: 20–50.

excludeStaffingAgencies.title: Exclude Staffing / Consulting Agencies?
excludeStaffingAgencies.description: ATS results are mostly direct employers, but this adds an extra safety filter.

minimumVisaScore.title: Minimum Visa Friendliness Score (1–10)
minimumVisaScore.description: Exclude jobs below this score. Jobs with explicit 'no sponsorship' language are always excluded regardless of this setting.
